description_long: This is a suspended pendant lamp featuring a dark metallic central fixture with three supporting rods that connect to a wide, shallow, frosted glass bowl-shaped shade. The rods are attached to the central stem with decorative spherical joints, adding a touch of classic elegance. The glass shade is semi-translucent, allowing diffused light to spread evenly below. The central stem extends upward, suggesting it is designed to hang from a ceiling. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces. The lamp's materials and construction indicate durability and a focus on both illumination and aesthetic appeal.
description: A ceiling-mounted pendant lamp with a frosted glass bowl shade and dark metal supports, featuring decorative joints and a classic, elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three supporting rods symmetrically attached to the central stem and the frosted glass bowl.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the alignment of the rods and the depth of the glass shade.
description_view_2: Side-angled view emphasizing the curvature of the glass bowl and the attachment points of the rods.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the symmetry of the rods and the central stem, with the glass bowl fully visible.
